description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single stage called parallel and a job named pages that runs in that stage using the default Docker image. The pages job should execute the exact shell commands: mkdir .public, cp -r * .public, and mv .public public. It must publish the resulting public/ directory as an artifact (paths: public) and be limited to run only on the master branch, deploying the artifact to GitLab Pages. No additional services, caches, or variables are required.
